a with rightwards arrow on top space equals space open parentheses table row 3 row cell negative 2 end cell end table close parentheses comma space b with rightwards arrow on top space equals space open parentheses table row 1 row 0 end table close parentheses comma space d a n space c with rightwards arrow on top space equals space open parentheses table row cell negative 5 end cell row 4 end table close parentheses. space
